title: Updating a row
prompt_md: Set the `rating` of the movie with `id` `3` (Tenet) to `8.0`. Return the `title` and new `rating` with `RETURNING`.
starter_code: UPDATE movies SET rating = 8.0 WHERE id = 3 RETURNING title, rating;
hints: `UPDATE table SET col = value WHERE ...` changes matching rows.
Never forget the `WHERE` — without it, every row is updated!
reference_solution: UPDATE movies SET rating = 8.0 WHERE id = 3 RETURNING title, rating;
